posts.title: 数据结构——链表
posts.text: 数据结构——链表 单向链表 节点头文件 SigleNode.hpp 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536#pragma once#ifndef _SIGLE_NODE_HPP_#define _SIGLE_NODE_HPP_template <class T>class SigleNode{public: //构造函数 SigleNode(); SigleNode(T, SigleNode*); //公有成员 T info; SigleNode* next;};//方法的类外实现//无参构造函数template <class T>SigleNode<T>::SigleNode(){ info = 0; next = nullptr;}//有参构造函数template <class T>SigleNode<T>::SigleNode(T info, SigleNode* next){ this->info = info; this->next = next;}#endif 链表头文件 SLList.hpp #pragma once#ifndef _SIGLE_LINK_LIST_HPP_#define _SIGLE_LINK_LIST_HPP_#include "SigleNode.hpp"#include <cstddef> //提供 ptrdiff_t 类#include <iterator> //提供 std::forward_iterator_tag 类template <class T>class SLList{public: //构造函数 SLList(); ~SLList(); //ADT 方法 bool isEmpty() const; void addToHead(const T); void addToTail(const T); T deleteFromHead(); T deleteFromTail(); void deleteNode(const T); bool isInList(const T) const; int theSize() const; private: //私有成员 SigleNode<T> *head, *tail; int size;public: //容器的迭代器类 class iterator { public: type typedef std::forward_iterator_tag iterator_category; typedef T value_type; typedef ptrdiff_t difference_type; typedef T* pointer; typedef T& reference; iterator(SigleNode<T>* theNode = nullptr); T& operator*() const; T* operator->() const; iterator& operator++(); iterator operator++(int); bool operator!=(const iterator) const; bool operator==(const iterator) const; private: SigleNode<T>* node; }; iterator begin() const; iterator end() const;};template <class T>SLList<T>::SLList(){ head = tail = nullptr; size = 0;}template <class T>SLList<T>::~SLList(){ for(SigleNode<T> *p; head != nullptr;) { p = head->next; delete head; size--; head = p; }}template <class T>bool SLList<T>::isEmpty() const{ return head == nullptr;}template <class T>void SLList<T>::addToHead(T elem){ head = new SigleNode<T>(elem, head); if(tail == nullptr) { tail = head; tail->next = nullptr; } size++;}template <class T>void SLList<T>::addToTail(const T elem){ tail->next = new SigleNode<T>(elem, nullptr); tail = tail->next; if(head == nullptr) { head = tail; tail->next = nullptr; } size++;}template <class T>T SLList<T>::deleteFromHead(){ T elem = head->info; SigleNode<T> *temp = head; if(head == tail) head = tail = nullptr; else head = head->next; delete temp; size--; return elem;}template <class T>T SLList<T>::deleteFromTail(){ T elem = tail->info; if(head == tail) { delete tail; head = tail =nullptr; } else { SigleNode<T> *temp; for(temp = head; temp->next != tail; temp = temp->next); delete tail; tail = temp; tail->next = nullptr; } size--; return elem;}template <class T>void SLList<T>::deleteNode(const T elem){ if(head != nullptr) { if(head == tail && elem == head->info) { delete head; head = tail = nullptr; } else if(elem == head->info) { SigleNode<T> *temp = head; head = head->next; delete temp; } else { SigleNode<T> *pred, *temp; for(pred = head, temp = head->next; (temp != nullptr) && !(temp->info ==elem); pred = pred->next, temp = temp->next); if(temp != nullptr) { pred->next = temp->next; if(temp == tail) tail = pred; delete temp; } } } size--;}template <class T>bool SLList<T>::isInList(const T elem) const{ SLList<T> *temp; for(temp = head; (temp != nullptr) && !(temp->info == elem); temp = temp->next); return temp != nullptr;}template <class T>int SLList<T>::theSize() const{ return size;}template <class T>SLList<T>::iterator::iterator(SigleNode<T>* theNode){ node = theNode;}template <class T>T& SLList<T>::iterator::operator*() const{ return node->info;}template <class T>T* SLList<T>::iterator::operator->() const{ return &node->info;}template <class T>typename SLList<T>::iterator& SLList<T>::iterator::operator++(){ node = node->next; return *this;}template <class T>typename SLList<T>::iterator SLList<T>::iterator::operator++(int){ iterator old = *this; node = node->next; return old;}template <class T>bool SLList<T>::iterator::operator!=(const iterator right) const{ return node != right.node;}template <class T>bool SLList<T>::iterator::operator==(const iterator right) const{ return node == right.node;}template <class T>typename SLList<T>::iterator SLList<T>::begin() const{ return iterator(head);}template <class T>typename SLList<T>::iterator SLList<T>::end() const{ return iterator(tail->next);}#endif 双向链表 节点头文件 DoubleNode.hpp 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132#pragma once#ifndef _DOUBLE_NODE_HPP_#define _DOUBLE_NODE_HPP_template <class T>class DoubleNode{public: DoubleNode(); DoubleNode(T, DoubleNode<T> *, DoubleNode<T> *); T info; DoubleNode<T> *prev; DoubleNode<T> *next;};template <class T>DoubleNode<T>::DoubleNode(){ info = 0; prev = next = nullptr;}template <class T>DoubleNode<T>::DoubleNode(T info, DoubleNode<T> *prev, DoubleNode<T> *next){ this->info; this->prev = prev; this->next = next;}#endif 链表头文件 SLList.hpp 未完待续。。。
posts.author: Crushed
